controlSet.description: Issuers of governed licenses must publish legitimacy evidence.
Issuance rights must be constrained to explicit scope.
License revocation must be operational and published.

failureModes: License authority is asserted but not evidenced
Revocation path is undefined for issued licenses
decisionPolicy: Governed licenses MUST NOT be treated as authoritative unless the issuing authority can prove its legitimacy and revocation path.
